export default {
  create_user: "https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/user/create-user",
  send_otp: "https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/auth/send-otp",
  verify_otp: "https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/auth/verify-email-otp",
  get_All_User: "https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/user/all-users",
  create_Emg_Req: "https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/emergency/create",



get_All_Emg_Req:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/emergency/getAllEmgReq",

update_Emg_Order:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/emergency/schedule-req",

get_All_Locations:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/location/all",

get_My_Emg_Req:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/emergency/my-requests",


get_Todays_Task:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/driver/today-task",

arrived_At_Task:"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/driver/arrived",
completed_Task:"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/driver/completed",

// completed_Task: "https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/driver/completed",


create_Location:"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/location/create",


assign_Zone:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/supervisor/assign-zone",

get_Supervisor_Locations:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/supervisor/getsupervisor-location",

get_Locations_By_Zone:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/location/get-location-by-zone",



delete_User:
"https://vercel-backend-vboc.vercel.app//api/user/delete-user",
};
